user.title: Camera Timelapse Setup
user.description: Configure the integration. Cameras are added after setup via the Configure button.

data_description.storage_path: Directory where timelapses and frames are saved. Use /media/timelapses for HA Media Browser access.

abort.already_configured: This storage path is already configured in another instance.

init.title: Manage Cameras
init.description: Add, edit or remove cameras from timelapse tracking.

add_camera.title: Add Camera
add_camera.description: Select the camera entity to add.

data.assembly_interval_minutes: Assemble timelapse every (minutes, 0 = only at end of day)
data.hdr_frames: Frame averaging (0 = off, 2–5 = frames to average)

data_description.hdr_frames: Capture multiple frames per interval and average them to reduce noise. 0 disables this feature.

capture_now.name: Capture Frame Now
capture_now.description: Immediately capture a frame from one or all configured cameras, bypassing the active time window.

generate_timelapse.name: Generate Timelapse Now
generate_timelapse.description: Manually trigger timelapse assembly for a camera.
